Name.jp: ダンジョンガーディアン〈刃〉

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

name.jp: エネルギースラッシュ

description.en: Attacks an enemy.\nThis attack has a high <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n이 스킬은 높은 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 가집니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が高い。
description.zh: 攻击敌人。\n该技能<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>高。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on one target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color> when attacking.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n공격 시 대상 한 명을 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n攻撃時、対象単体に<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n攻击时,有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率使1名目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
